label: Classical baseline required
description: Every QML experiment must include a classical baseline

label: Small reviewable changes
description: Avoid large rewrites and dependency sprawl

label: Ethics & Claims Reviewer
description: Weakens unsupported claims and requires limitations

label: Documentation Agent
description: Maintains docs, templates, task board, reports

label: Maintainer / Human Reviewer
description: Approves governance, reputation, and risky changes

label: Contribution Loop
description: Select task -> packet -> validate -> PR -> review -> log

label: Benchmark Loop
description: Plan -> baseline -> QML candidate -> evaluate -> report

label: Baseline Integrity Gate
description: Requires classical baseline and fair comparison

label: Irreproducible Results
description: Missing seed, split, environment, or metrics
